bead.title: metric: FEAT-014/FEAT-016 cross-reference edits
bead.description: Cross-reference FEAT-014 (token awareness) and FEAT-016 (process metrics) with the new MET artifact convention.
bead.acceptance: 1. Both FEATs have explicit cross-refs to MET artifacts. 2. ddx doc audit clean.
